title: Visual Annotation Study
description: In this study, you will view charts with captions and draw visual annotations to explain the given caption on top of the chart.

consent.title: Research Consent Form
content: This research aims to understand how people visually annotate charts to communicate data insights.
Your responses will be collected anonymously and used solely for research purposes.
Participation is voluntary, and you may withdraw at any time without penalty.
The estimated completion time is approximately 15 minutes.
